rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions — routine held, which is real, but the joy police were running the vibe the whole time. Then the Apollo ring moment: a colleague literally handed you an opening and you shut the door. The ring stayed on though. That part? Yours.
pattern: They're letting you wear the things but silencing the stories behind them.
focus: Next time someone asks about the ring, you don't have to explain everything — just don't shut it down. One true sentence is enough.
